---
title: "Alphabetic Lowercase"
format:
  html: default
  pdf: default
  typst:
    output-file: "example-alpha-lower-typst.pdf"
filters:
  - ../_extensions/footnote-styles/footnote-styles.lua
extensions:
  footnote-styles:
    style: "alpha-lower"
    separator: "."
---

This is some text with a footnote.[^1] Here is another footnote.[^2] And a third.[^3]

A fourth footnote here.[^4] And a fifth.[^5]

Sixth,[^6] seventh,[^7] eighth,[^8] ninth,[^9] and tenth.[^10]

[^1]: First footnote.
[^2]: Second footnote.
[^3]: Third footnote.
[^4]: Fourth footnote.
[^5]: Fifth footnote.
[^6]: Sixth footnote.
[^7]: Seventh footnote.
[^8]: Eighth footnote.
[^9]: Ninth footnote.
[^10]: Tenth footnote.
